fields.description: Update can use the key field on the table, or any other supported unique field

fields.label: Merge Field Name or ID
fields.description: You're updating records in a Quick Base table with data from an external file. In order for a merge like this to work, Quick Base needs a way to match records in the source data with corresponding records in the destination table.You make this possible by choosing the field in the app table that holds unique matching values. This is called a merge field.. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Simplify
fields.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: fields, useFieldIDs)

endpoints.description: Create a new record, or update the current one if it already exists (upsert)

fields.label: Table ID

fields.label: Where
fields.description: The filter to delete records. To delete all records specify a filter that will include all records, for example {3.GT.0} where 3 is the ID of the Record ID field.
